events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The elongation record vs. calculated mismatch is a genuine PT quality-control failure per PTI field procedures — actual elongation must reconcile with theoretical elongation (industry tolerance ~±7%), and an unresolved discrepancy means the induced prestress force can't be verified. I flagged it `fail`/`high` risk with `installed-defective`/`non-compliant` conditions, and wrote the full findings, corrective actions, and references to `/app/answer.json`.
